notes: No existing codebase or explicit input files were provided beyond the governing SKILL.md.
The service is greenfield, internal-facing, and expected to operate at moderate scale.
A GitHub App and webhook-based intake model are preferred over PAT-based integrations.
Each review run is immutable and tied to a specific repository, pull request, and head SHA.
Evaluators can run independently in parallel and produce structured, versioned results for later comparison.
with_skill improves mean pass rate from 82.5% to 89.2% (+6.7 percentage points).
with_skill wins outright on eval 3 and eval 5, and ties the baseline on evals 0, 1, 2, and 4.
with_skill is slightly faster on average (815.8s vs 843.7s, 27.8s faster) but uses modestly more output tokens/chars on average (+530).
No measured eval regressed versus the baseline.
